outcome_autofill_reasoning: The call was a highly productive outbound conversation with Krista Garcia, the intended contact. She engaged extensively with Andre to build out a detailed catering quote for her husband's 40th birthday churrasco party (75 people, full menu including bar service, appetizers, desserts, etc.). The call ended with a clear next step agreed upon: Andre will finalize the quote with manager review and send it to Krista, followed by a second phone call to lock in the booking. However, no meeting was explicitly scheduled/booked with a specific time — only a vague plan to reconnect after the quote is sent. This fits "Qualified – Needs Next Step," as the prospect is clearly a strong fit, highly engaged, and interested in moving forward, but no firm meeting or booking was confirmed.

recording_transcript.summary_html:
• Discussed 75-person Brazilian churrasco event for husband's 40th birthday in client's backyard with alcohol included.
  • Built Supreme Churrasco menu with four meats, three sides, two salads, multiple appetizers, and desserts.
  • Selected open bar service with beer, wine, and signature drinks including caipirinhas.
  • Added table clearing service and requested five-hour duration; client prefers disposable serviceware.
  • Andre to send finalized quote for manager review before follow-up call to lock in booking.

Event Overview and Client Requirements

  • 75 people total: 67 adults and 25 kids, though Krista expects approximately 15 people not to attend.
  • Event is for husband's 40th birthday; he is Brazilian, so the family wants a full churrasco experience.
  • Event will be held in client's backyard with electricity available, a hose for water, but no running water with sink outside.
  • Client wants a full churrasco catering experience with barbecue pit brought to the location for on-site grilling.
  • Alcohol included in the event to fully support the party atmosphere.

Meats and Proteins Selected

  • Selected Supreme Churrasco package with four meats: beef short ribs, filet mignon, pork loin with garlic butter, and picanha.
  • Client initially wanted chicken wings but changed to filet mignon as a substitute based on Andre's recommendation that everyone loves filet mignon.
  • Client requested chicken hearts, which Andre confirmed can be sourced even though not currently on the menu.
  • Andre and Krista discussed but ultimately excluded lamb due to limited appeal among guests.

Sides, Salads, and Appetizers

  • Selected three sides: rice, tropero beans (with farina), and yuca for the family preference.
  • Client requested Caesar salad and Brazilian-style chicken salad (salpicone) as the two salads.
  • Appetizers include traditional ponche quejo, assorted croquettes (three-in-one sampler with chicken and cheese, corn and cheese, and beef and yuca), and queijo coaglio with honey (grilled cheese with honey drizzled on top).
  • Client added veggie platter (carrots, broccoli, celery, cherry tomatoes with ranch dip) and fruit platter (watermelon, honeydew, pineapple) as boards.
  • Assorted croquettes are $8.50 per person as a bundled option versus individual pricing of $3.50 each.

Desserts and Bar Service

  • Client added flan and grilled pineapple with cinnamon sugar as desserts.
  • Client declining cake service, stating she will source the cake separately; Andre offered to assist with cake cutting if needed.
  • Bar service includes open bar setup with beer and wine plus three signature drinks (caipirinha confirmed as one, with other two to be determined later).
  • Bar service includes disposables for serving, and beers available include Corona and Heineken options.

Service Options and Final Details

  • Client prefers disposable flatware, silverware, and napkins over real china due to poolside location.
  • Table clearing and bussing service added to the quote for client to review the cost.
  • Client initially hesitant about chicken fingers and French fries for kids; decided to proceed without kid-specific meal options for now, as her children eat adult meals.
  • Client requested quote to show cost difference between four-hour and five-hour event duration.
  • Andre will have manager review the complete quote before sending to client, with follow-up call scheduled to finalize and lock in the booking.
recording_transcript.summary_text:
- Discussed **75-person Brazilian churrasco event for husband's 40th birthday** in client's backyard with alcohol included.
- Built Supreme Churrasco menu with four meats, three sides, two salads, multiple appetizers, and desserts.
- Selected open bar service with beer, wine, and signature drinks including caipirinhas.
- Added table clearing service and requested five-hour duration; client prefers disposable serviceware.
- Andre to send finalized quote for manager review before follow-up call to lock in booking.

### Event Overview and Client Requirements
- **75 people total: 67 adults and 25 kids**, though Krista expects approximately 15 people not to attend.
- **Event is for husband's 40th birthday; he is Brazilian**, so the family wants a full churrasco experience.
- **Event will be held in client's backyard** with electricity available, a hose for water, but no running water with sink outside.
- Client wants a full churrasco catering experience with barbecue pit brought to the location for on-site grilling.
- **Alcohol included in the event** to fully support the party atmosphere.

### Meats and Proteins Selected
- Selected Supreme Churrasco package with four meats: beef short ribs, filet mignon, pork loin with garlic butter, and picanha.
- Client initially wanted chicken wings but changed to filet mignon as a substitute based on Andre's recommendation that everyone loves filet mignon.
- Client requested chicken hearts, which Andre confirmed can be sourced even though not currently on the menu.
- Andre and Krista discussed but ultimately excluded lamb due to limited appeal among guests.

### Sides, Salads, and Appetizers
- Selected three sides: rice, tropero beans (with farina), and yuca for the family preference.
- Client requested Caesar salad and Brazilian-style chicken salad (salpicone) as the two salads.
- Appetizers include traditional ponche quejo, assorted croquettes (three-in-one sampler with chicken and cheese, corn and cheese, and beef and yuca), and queijo coaglio with honey (grilled cheese with honey drizzled on top).
- Client added veggie platter (carrots, broccoli, celery, cherry tomatoes with ranch dip) and fruit platter (watermelon, honeydew, pineapple) as boards.
- Assorted croquettes are $8.50 per person as a bundled option versus individual pricing of $3.50 each.

### Desserts and Bar Service
- Client added flan and grilled pineapple with cinnamon sugar as desserts.
- Client declining cake service, stating she will source the cake separately; Andre offered to assist with cake cutting if needed.
- Bar service includes open bar setup with beer and wine plus three signature drinks (caipirinha confirmed as one, with other two to be determined later).
- Bar service includes disposables for serving, and beers available include Corona and Heineken options.

### Service Options and Final Details
- Client prefers disposable flatware, silverware, and napkins over real china due to poolside location.
- Table clearing and bussing service added to the quote for client to review the cost.
- Client initially hesitant about chicken fingers and French fries for kids; decided to proceed without kid-specific meal options for now, as her children eat adult meals.
- Client requested quote to show cost difference between four-hour and five-hour event duration.
- Andre will have manager review the complete quote before sending to client, with follow-up call scheduled to finalize and lock in the booking.
